conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area.
org_constraint: Conclude your review with the phrase "a delightful addition to the neighborhood."
new_constraint: Do not use the keyword "delightful" in your review.
instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area. Conclude your review with the phrase "a delightful addition to the neighborhood." Do not use the keyword "delightful" in your review.
response:
I recently had the chance to visit "The Roasted Bean," a charming new cafe that just opened on the corner of Maple Street. From the moment I stepped inside, I was struck by the warm, rustic interior and the rich aroma of freshly ground espresso.

I ordered a vanilla latte and a flaky almond croissant. The latte was perfectly balanced—creamy without being overly sweet—and the barista took the time to explain the different single-origin beans they offer. The croissant was buttery and crisp, clearly baked to order. While the seating area is cozy, it can get a bit crowded during the morning rush, but the friendly staff makes the experience very welcoming. It is a wonderful spot for anyone looking to enjoy a high-quality brew in a serene atmosphere, making it a lovely addition to the neighborhood.<turn|>
